# Purge Git Mandates & Optimize Dashboard

### Goal
Reduce prompt payload across Swarm operations by deleting manual git instructions and reserving `sandman_handoff.md` strictly as a Strategic Co-Founder Dashboard.

### Implementation Checklist
- [ ] Reformat `AGENTS.md` and `AGENTS_STARTUP.md` to remove raw `gh pr create` manual terminal commands.
- [ ] Optimize the `DreamService` topological extraction logic to strictly format `sandman_handoff.md` as an executive, high-level priority dashboard.
